title: [VPlan] Add `-vplan-print-after=` option
author: eas
description: UpdateTestChecks support is updated in subsequent https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/178736.

tests.test_body:
define void @foo(ptr %ptr, i64 %n) {
entry:
  br label %header

header:                                           ; preds = %header, %entry
  %iv = phi i64 [ 0, %entry ], [ %iv.next, %header ]
  %gep = getelementptr i64, ptr %ptr, i64 %iv
  store i64 %iv, ptr %gep, align 4
  %iv.next = add nsw i64 %iv, 1
  %exitcond = icmp slt i64 %iv.next, %n
  br i1 %exitcond, label %header, label %exit

exit:                                             ; preds = %header
  ret void
}

comments.author: eas
comments.body: @fhahn , @lukel97 , technically it includes https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/178547 in its entirety, but I've based this on the trunk commit before the revert to minimize the diff here, so that review could start productively before #178547 lands.
